case_title: LEA WATERS et al VS. JONITA LANGLEY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-01-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATERS, LEA CLEE, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT LANGLEY, JONITA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-13-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-08-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-29-2004

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-29-2004 CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-29-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-13-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST JOANN KINGSTON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-29-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-14-2004. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY : CANDICE YOUNT (212)
